author: y4rr
content: Result: 14 new conformance tests in conformance_serialize_mmap.rs covering load_safetensors_mmap (single-file f32/f64 round-trip, empty dict, missing-file error, owned-data guarantee, shape preservation), load_safetensors_sharded_mmap (sharded round-trip, missing shard, malformed index, tensor-not-in-shard error), and load_pytorch_state_dict_mmap (round-trip, missing-file error, owned-data). Three #850 exclusion entries removed from _surface_exclusions.toml. cascade_skip removed from conformance_serialize.rs. 14/14 pass, clippy clean.
